coreIssue: Discuss the communication skills {{NAME}} needs to develop to transition from Expert UX Designer to a lead role.
openingQuestion: What specific communication challenges have you faced recently that might impact your transition to a lead role?
listenFor: if they have a plan to improve communication
whether he has received feedback on communication
avoid: do not focus solely on technical skills
do not dismiss his current communication methods
goodOutcome: You and {{NAME}} have agreed on one specific communication skill to focus on improving this quarter.
suggestedAction: Set a follow-up meeting in one month to review progress on the agreed communication skill.
